description: Evaluation suite for the Atomic Design System agent skill

evals.prompt: Create a 3-slide strategy deck for our Q3 OKR review. We have 3 objectives: 'Grow Revenue' at 80%, 'Improve NPS' at 60%, and 'Reduce Churn' at 100%.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent produces 3 slides: (1) hero-title template with mission statement, (2) grid-3 template with 3 objective-card molecules showing KR progress badges, (3) data-insight template with a chart summarizing progress. All using strategy domain molecules.
pass_criteria: Produces exactly 3 slide sections
References hero-title template in slide 1
References grid-3 or comparison-2col in slide 2
Uses objective-card molecules with progress values
Badge variants match: 80%=warning, 60%=warning, 100%=success

evals.prompt: I have a screenshot of our brand guidelines at brand-guidelines.png. Extract the design tokens from it and apply them to our deck.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent runs visual extraction, presents proposed token mappings for user review BEFORE writing any file. Shows found vs not-found tokens. Awaits explicit approval before writing design-config.yaml.
pass_criteria: Does NOT write design-config.yaml before showing extraction results
Presents color token mappings in a readable table
Lists which required tokens were NOT found
States what fallback values will be used for missing tokens
Only writes after user confirms

evals.prompt: Build a team intro slide with 4 leadership profiles and a company mission statement below them.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent produces at minimum 2 slides: (1) hero-title with mission statement, (2) grid-3 or comparison-2col with 4 profile-card molecules. If grid-3 is used, note it supports max 3 columns so agent may use two rows or a 2+2 layout across slides.
pass_criteria: Mission statement appears in a dedicated slide or hero zone
4 profile-cards are included
Layout choice is justified briefly
Names slots explicitly in the output markdown

evals.prompt: Create a data slide showing monthly revenue for Jan–Jun: 120k, 135k, 128k, 150k, 162k, 178k. Include a trend insight that revenue is up 48% YTD.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent uses data-insight template with chart-card (bar or line) on the left zone and data-insight-panel on the right. Trend badge should be success/positive. KPI strip at bottom shows YTD value.
pass_criteria: Uses data-insight template
Chart contains all 6 monthly data points
YTD +48% appears as a KPI
Insight text is on the right zone, chart on left

evals.prompt: Apply the IBM Carbon design preset to our entire deck.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent loads assets/presets/carbon.yaml, merges with active design-config.yaml, confirms token changes (radius=0 for sharp corners, IBM Blue 60 primary, IBM Plex Sans font). Reports the delta before applying.
pass_criteria: References carbon preset explicitly
Reports that border-radius changes to 0 (sharp corners)
Reports primary color change to #0043CE
Does not modify element markdown files

evals.prompt: Add a new atom called 'progress-ring' — it should show a circular progress indicator with a percentage in the center.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent creates atoms/progress-ring.md with correct schema, adds it to registry.yaml, validates that all required fields are present.
pass_criteria: Creates atoms/progress-ring.md
Includes front-matter: id, type, title, description, version, status
Includes data-input-schema with at least 'value' (0-100) and 'label' fields
Adds entry to registry.yaml with correct file path and at least 2 tags
Does not introduce hex color literals (uses tokens)

evals.prompt: Check if our design system library is valid and report any issues.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent runs lint.py, reports pass/fail for each check category, presents any violations with file paths and line numbers. Offers to fix auto-fixable issues.
pass_criteria: Runs lint.py against the skill root
Reports results for all 9 lint checks
Lists specific violations with actionable detail
Does not silently suppress warnings
